about.title: Our Story
about.p1: Nadi Cafe is a premium destination in Jigjiga for health-conscious foodies and lovers of natural drinks. Born from a passion for wellness and community, we bring the vibrant energy of fresh ingredients to every glass.
about.p2: We specialize in 100% natural cold-pressed juices, creamy tropical smoothies, and authentic Ethiopian Jebena coffee. Every recipe is crafted with care, using the freshest locally sourced fruits and ingredients.
about.p3: What started as a simple vision — to make healthy living delicious and accessible in Jigjiga — has grown into a beloved local gem where quality meets warmth.

footer.tagline: From our kitchen to your heart
